programmes.show_description: How do you tell a right laugh from a wrong one? From poetry to evidence-rap lyrics on trial; and where are you really from? Contains some strong language.
The Elephant Man never forgets: Adam Pearson on disability casting, and what the Dickens is going on with banning Victorian authors?
Edward Adoo sits in with your calls through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Felicity Hannah hears how surging oil and gas prices could affect the global economy, and how energy suppliers are positioned to deal with market volatility.

A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Clare McDonnell and Chris Warburton. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
